description: You are an energy auditor preparing a building energy certification submittal for the 4StoreyBuilding. Implement two approved energy conservation measures (ECMs) in the annual energy simulation. For ECM 1 (Zone Thermostat Reset for Middle Floor), set the design cooling setpoint (DESIGN-COOL-T) to 76°F and the design heating setpoint (DESIGN-HEAT-T) to 71°F for all conditioned Middle Floor (M.*) zones. For ECM 2 (High-Reflectance White Roof), set the solar absorptance (ABSORPTANCE) of the 'Roof Construction' to 0.35 to represent a Class A cool roof. Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation to quantify the combined energy savings and save the project.
